ideation: This animation sequence mimics the action of inserting or ejecting a videocassette. The robot will use both arms in a coordinated movement, suggesting the careful handling of a delicate object. Frame 1 shows both arms extended forward, palms up, as if presenting the cassette. Frame 2 shows the right arm moving slightly down and back as if to support the cassette. Frame 3 shows both arms moving to the sides, suggesting the cassette is now in place. Frame 4 shows both arms coming together in a relaxed position, indicating the end of the action.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, palms up, ready to receive
right arm lowers slightly, supporting the cassette
both arms swing out, cassette now inserted
arms return to rest, action complete
